title: Moult duplication report
description: Typed output contract for `moult duplication`. One of Moult's two protected APIs. Every finding is a confidence-graded clone group carrying its reasons; nothing here asserts that duplication is certainly removable.

schema_version.description: Bumped only on a breaking change to this shape.

min_mass.description: Mass threshold below which fragments were ignored.

fuzzy.description: Whether near-matches (not just structural-equivalents) were included.

reason.description: One auditable contribution to a finding's confidence.

occurrence.description: One site of a clone group.

symbol_id.description: Best-effort enclosing-method join key ("<path>:<start_line>:<fqname>"), shared with the hotspots/deadcode contracts. Null when the fragment is not inside a known method (top-level code, or a duplicated whole class).

line.description: Clone start line (flay reports line granularity).

fuzzy.description: True only for a near-match site surfaced in fuzzy mode.

confidence.description: Likelihood this is genuine, consolidatable duplication, in [0, 1]. Never an assertion of certainty.

kind.description: identical=byte-for-byte match; similar=same structure, differing names/literals.

node_type.description: The duplicated AST node's type (flay sexp type, e.g. "defn", "call", "class").

mass.description: flay's structural mass of the duplicated node.

clone_group.description: Clone-group join key, "<kind>:<structural-hash>" where kind is identical|similar. Every occurrence of this finding shares it. Stable within a report only (the hash comes from the detector backend).

reasons.description: The factors that raised or lowered the confidence, in application order.

occurrences.description: The sites of this clone group; a group has at least two.
